# hyperv_host (Data Source)

Information about the Hyper-V host. Useful in `for_each` patterns and for capability detection (e.g. branching on `logical_processor_count` or `memory_capacity_bytes`).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `computer_name` (String) Hostname of the Hyper-V host (from `Get-VMHost.ComputerName`).
- `logical_processor_count` (Number) Number of logical processors visible to Hyper-V.
- `memory_capacity_bytes` (Number) Total host memory in bytes.
- `virtual_hard_disk_path` (String) Default path Hyper-V stores virtual hard disks in.
- `virtual_machine_path` (String) Default path Hyper-V stores VM configuration files in.
